mainEntity.name: What makes your courses different from other platforms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our programs are designed by industry experts and emphasize practical, project-based learning with mentor support. You’ll work on real scenarios, follow an updated syllabus, earn certifications, and get career services for job-readiness.

mainEntity.name: Do I need prior experience to enroll?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. We offer beginner, intermediate, and advanced tracks. Each course clearly lists prerequisites so you can choose the right difficulty and learn at your own pace.

mainEntity.name: Will I receive a certificate upon completion?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. You’ll get an industry-recognized certificate you can add to your résumé and LinkedIn profile. Certificates highlight your skills and verified project work.

mainEntity.name: What kind of career support do you provide?

acceptedAnswer.text: We offer résumé reviews, portfolio building, mock interviews, referral guidance, and job alerts. The goal is to translate your learning into interviews and offers.

mainEntity.name: How long do I retain access to course content?

acceptedAnswer.text: You receive long-term access to recorded lessons, notes, and project resources. Live sessions and mentorship schedules are announced inside your dashboard.
Yes. We provide a transparent, time-bound refund window. Please review the refund policy on the course page for exact timelines and eligibility.
A blended format: live mentor sessions, self-paced videos, hands-on labs, and graded projects. Doubt-clearing and community forums ensure fast feedback.

name: How to Enroll in CDPL Courses
description: A simple step-by-step guide to enrolling in our certification programs.

step.name: Browse Courses
step.text: Explore our comprehensive list of Software Testing, Data Science, and AI/ML courses.

step.name: Select a Program
step.text: Choose the training program that aligns with your career goals.

step.name: Contact Admissions
step.text: Reach out to our admissions team for counseling and batch details.

step.name: Start Learning
step.text: Attend live classes, complete hands-on projects, and get certified!
